Class Bid

java.lang.Object
whistapp.domain.bids.Bid
Direct Known Subclasses:
Abondance, Miserie, Proposal, Solo
public abstract class Bid extends Object
Abstract class representing the current Round's bid (not a player's bid)

  • Field Details

    • declarers

      protected ArrayList<Player> declarers

  • Constructor Details

    • Bid

      public Bid(ArrayList<Player> declarers) throws IllegalArgumentException
      A constructor for an abstract bid. This performs the general checks.
      Parameters:
      declarers - A list of the declarers for this bid.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - Throws when the declarer list is empty. Throws when the declarer list has repeated declarers.

  • Method Details

    • calculatePoints

      public abstract HashMap<Player,Integer> calculatePoints(HashMap<Player,Integer> tricksWon)
      A method to calculate the points for a trick when given the amount of tricks won per player, and if these players bid or not.
      Parameters:
      tricksWon - The amount of tricks won per player.
      Returns:
      The calculated points per player for this bid.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - Throws when the given arrays aren't of a correct length. Throws when the sum of won tricks isn't equal to 13.

      Precondition: The map must contain exactly the players currently active in the round: tricksWon.keySet().containsAll(activePlayers)

      Precondition: The sum of all tricks won must equal the total number of tricks played: sum(tricksWon.values()) == 13

      Note: Inconsistencies (like the map being size 4, matching the number of players, or the sum of tricks won being 13) are not checked here; that is the responsibility of the information experts for players (Game) and tricks (Round).

    • isDeclarer

      public boolean isDeclarer(Player player)
      Simple checker for if a given player is a declarer of this bid
      Parameters:
      player - the player to check for
      Returns:
      true if that player is a declarer of this bid, false otherwise

    • getBidders

      public List<Player> getBidders()
      Simple getter to retrieve the declarers of this bid.
      Returns:
      a list containing all players that declared this bid

    • getOpenMiserieHands

      public HashMap<Player,String[]> getOpenMiserieHands(Player currentPlayer)
      A getter for finding the open miserie hands the given player can see. This means the player's own hand will never be included in the output.
      Parameters:
      currentPlayer - The current player that needs to see the hands.
      Returns:
      A map of players with their hands. This map is empty if the bid isn't open miserie, or if the other players haven't bid open miserie.

    • isRightAmountOfDeclarers

      protected boolean isRightAmountOfDeclarers(ArrayList<Player> declarers, int amountOfDeclarers)
      A simple helper method that checks for a certain amount of declarers in a given declarer array.
      Parameters:
      declarers - The declarer list to be checked.
      amountOfDeclarers - The correct number of declarers it should be.
      Returns:
      True if the number of declarers matches the given amount, False otherwise.

    • createDeclarersFromPlayer

      protected static ArrayList<Player> createDeclarersFromPlayer(Player declarer)
      A helper method that creates an ArrayList from a single Player. By only accepting a single Player in Abondance, ProposalAlone, and other single declarer bids, we make sure that the declarer ArrayList is always of size 1.
      Parameters:
      declarer - The Player to be added to the ArrayList.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList containing the given Player.

    • generateScores

      protected HashMap<Player,Integer> generateScores(HashMap<Player,Integer> tricksWon, int declarerScore, int nonDeclarerScore)
      A helper method that generates the scores array when given the positive and negative scores for the bidders and the non-bidders (not respectively per se).
      Parameters:
      tricksWon - The number of tricks won per player, needed for building the scores per player.
      declarerScore - The score for the players that declared this bid.
      nonDeclarerScore - The score for the players that didn't declare for this bid.
      Returns:
      The final scores for each of the players.
